plan: Trim SPY to 20% to cure concentration and reduce broad index exposure.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to exit leveraged ETFs for capital preservation.
Increase QQQI to 25% to favor income and provide a stable base.
Buy XLF at 5% to diversify into a high-scoring setup.
Buy PANW at 5% to add quality tech with a strong scanner read.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation by reducing leverage and high-beta exposure.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets a modest ~1.5% per month, focusing on capital preservation and reduced volatility. Expect lower drawdowns but also limited upside potential. It aims for stability over aggressive growth.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to cure concentration and balance broad index exposure.
Sell SOXL entirely as it is below its stop and a leveraged ETF.
Trim SPAL to 2% to reduce leveraged ETF exposure.
Add to CRWD, increasing to 18%, pressing a winning quality tech name.
Buy PANW at 7% to add a high-scoring quality tech name.
Buy MSFT at 5% to diversify into another strong quality tech setup.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets ~2.5% per month, balancing growth with risk management. It reduces overall leverage and concentration while adding to quality tech. Expect moderate swings, aiming for consistent growth.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to cure concentration and reallocate for aggressive growth.
Sell SOXL entirely as it is below its stop, freeing capital.
Trim SPAL to 2% as it is below its stop, reducing problematic exposure.
Add to CRWD, increasing to 20%, pressing a winning quality tech name.
Buy PANW at 10% to add a high-scoring quality tech name.
Buy NVDU at 8% to add high-scoring semiconductor leverage.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% per month, leaning into high-scoring setups and quality tech. It significantly increases exposure to high-beta names and may add leveraged ETFs. Expect substantially higher volatility and potential for significant drawdowns; daily decay of leveraged ETFs is a factor. Strict stop discipline is crucial.

plan: Trim SPY to 20% and QQQ to 10% to shift focus from broad index to income.
Increase QQQI to 35% to significantly boost income generation.
Trim CRWD to 5% and SMH to 5% to reduce high-beta and cyclical sector exposure.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate leveraged ETFs and reduce risk.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and low drawdown over growth.
income.read: This income plan targets ~1% per month, prioritizing steady monthly distributions and capital preservation. Expect lower growth potential and reduced volatility, but NAV can still fluctuate. Distributions are variable and not guaranteed, and this is not a savings account.
